title: IE Aether & Create
description: Light-weight modpack based primarily on  Aether and its addons, Create mod & expansions, Immersive Engineering and many other useful mods
body:
The Ultimate Minecraft Vanilla++ Technological experience, designed for players looking for a cohesive and expansive and incredibly beautiful yet non-bloated Minecraft modded experience.

Highly optimized for lower-end PCs and high-end PCs alike! and includes a server pack for users looking to play multiplayer right away with Friends.

Create + Immersive Engineering are balanced through scripts and compatability mods to be fair for the player and work seamlessly with each other (all changes listed below)
Highlight mods are 
- Create + Addons 
- Immersive Engineering
- Embers Rekindled
- Simple Tombstones
- Aether + it's addons
- Quark (modified config)
- Quark Oddities (Matrix Enchanting, item pipes, magnets)
- Wearable Backpacks
- Immersive Aircraft + Intergration with Create mod
- Farmer's Delight ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)) + Aquaculture 2 ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)) + Aquaculture Delight ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight)) + [Ocean's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oceans-delight)

YUNG's mods are included (excluding Better Dungeons but can be added by the user if desired) to enchance the Minecraft experience greatly.
Simple Gravestones mod is included for player deaths and to make the MC experience a little less frustrating.


Changes:
-IE's VBOs are disabled to ensure shaders work properly with machines
-IE's Crates are disabled for balance
-Ember's Ore Generation of silver/lead replaced with IE's ore gen
-Leather can be converted/crafted from IE's Erstaz leather

-Ore doubling via Immersive Engineering is back (for both Crusher and Arc Furnace)!
-Grit smelted in the furnace yields is changed to yield XP (by default IE's ore grits/dust don't yield XP)

-Each ore smelted in Arc Furnace yields 2 ingots per ore, along with Nuggets of Experience to ensure that the player does not miss out on XP that otherwise only be acquired by smelting ores or using Create's Crusher
-Chances of yielding a nugget of experience (3.0 XP each) in the Arc Furnace are based off the experience gained when smelting said ores in the Furnace and are as follows:
- Aluminum 	10.00%
- Copper		23.33%  
- Gold 		33.33%
- Iron		23.33%
- Lead 		23.33%
- Nickel 		33.33%
- Silver		23.33%
- Uranium		33.33%
- Zinc		23.33%

-Enchanting system is highly enhanced with Matrix Enchanting from Quark Oddities
-Easy Anvil mod for more forgiving Anvils and decreased costs
-Visual Workbench mod allows beautiful and seamless crafting
-Create Jetpacks intergrated as Curios baubles

Please feel free to join to server to find a community to play with, make suggestions, or report bugs!

Additional notes:
Create Immersive Aircrafts
[Aether Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-delight) mod by nocubeyt recommended but is not included in modpack due to licensing issues.

[Faithful 32x](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-32x/files/5505946)

[Faithful 32x Modded](https://github.com/Faithful-Resource-Pack/Faithful-32x-Mods/tree/1.20.x)

[Faithful 32x - Immersive Aircraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-32x-immersive-aircraft/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20) 

[Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack) resources packs all recommended for the best experience.
